payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Upper wall-mounted dark brown wooden cabinet with two recessed-panel doors and a central vertical seam; matte stained finish shows subtle wood grain and minor scuffs, bottom edge of the cabinet is cut off by the crop and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).
